items.message: No unit test failures detected on main (HEAD commit a53767f3d5baa27f5af9705234ff38f06586a192). All 14 failing CI check runs show 0 failed unit tests — the "3 errors" in each build summary come from non-unit-test ADO pipeline steps (CredScan, API compatibility, or analysis tasks) that are not accessible from this environment. Known failures list (issue #37864) is empty. No issue created.
